phases.name: Phase 1 - Foundation
phases.description: v0.1 - Core survival features. Minimum needed for first weeks.

tasks.desc: Set up PostgreSQL database and schema
Create Family, User, Baby models with associations
Create Activity model with Delegated Types (Feeding, Diaper, Sleep)
Create baby setup flow (name, birth date)
Implement real-time sync with ActionCable/Turbo Streams
Create feeding log (breast sides + duration, bottle volume)
Optimize UI for one-handed thumb-zone operation
Add bottom navigation and FAB for quick logging

phases.name: Phase 2 - Sustainability
phases.description: v0.2 - Features for long-term use. Add when Phase 1 is stable.

tasks.desc: Add daily summary stats (total sleep, feeding)
Add timer controls (pause, resume for sleep)

phases.name: Phase 3 - Polish
phases.description: v1.0 - Nice to have before pediatrician visits.

deployment.production: Deploy via Kamal to Hetzner when app is usable
